'''bashopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hubshi|hubshi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hubshi|hubshi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bashopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæshepeth|bæshepeth]] || [[word:bæshepej|bæshepej]] || [[word:bæshepesh|bæshepesh]] || [[word:bæshepe|bæshepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashoshopoth|bashoshopoth]] || [[word:bashoshopoj|bashoshopoj]] || [[word:bashoshoposh|bashoshoposh]] || [[word:bashoshopo|bashoshopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashopoth|bashopoth]] || [[word:bashopoj|bashopoj]] || [[word:bashoposh|bashoposh]] || [[word:bashopo|bashopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashofpoth|bashofpoth]] || [[word:bashofpoj|bashofpoj]] || [[word:bashofposh|bashofposh]] || [[word:bashofpof|bashofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bashopotho|bashopotho]] || [[word:bashopojo|bashopojo]] || [[word:bashoposho|bashoposho]] || [[word:bashopoko|bashopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bashopoth|bashopoth]] || [[word:bashopoj|bashopoj]] || [[word:bashoposh|bashoposh]] || [[word:bashopo|bashopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bashopothol|bashopothol]] || [[word:bashopojol|bashopojol]] || [[word:bashoposhol|bashoposhol]] || [[word:bashopokol|bashopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bashopothotho|bashopothotho]] || [[word:bashopojojo|bashopojojo]] || [[word:bashoposhosho|bashoposhosho]] || [[word:bashopoko|bashopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bashopothon|bashopothon]] || [[word:bashopojon|bashopojon]] || [[word:bashoposhon|bashoposhon]] || [[word:bashopokon|bashopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bashopothoro|bashopothoro]] || [[word:bashopojoro|bashopojoro]] || [[word:bashoposhoro|bashoposhoro]] || [[word:bashopokoro|bashopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
